articles.author: Lucas Ropek
articles.title: Apple is reportedly planning new iPad Pro and MacBook Pro releases early next year - TechCrunch
articles.description: Apple is readying several new iPad Pro tablets and a budget-friendly MacBook Pro, reports suggest.
articles.content:
Apple reportedly has plans to release several new iPad Pros and a new MacBook Pro in the first half of next year.
The company is currently working on four models of the new tablet with faster chips,… [+1130 chars]
